{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323160054623E26D0B6C01D4B618C"}"},"total":48},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7593318693864358680","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好，作者爱女主，文章就不会憋屈，女主很可爱很强，是个对善良的人善良、对坏人利落下手的人，女角色很多戏份也多，由于是综漫每个动漫具体描述得不多，时间线也不是一点一点铺，就不像那么千篇一律，女主就是第四天灾本灾，又善良又不会被道德绑架","text_exts":[{"e":103,"s":99,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742528541D4B618C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227593318693864358680%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227575450495360175129%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":117,"s":113,"text":"道德绑架","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%81%93%E5%BE%B7%E7%BB%91%E6%9E%B6&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742528541D4B618C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227593318693864358680%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227575450495360175129%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%81%93%E5%BE%B7%E7%BB%91%E6%9E%B6%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767960686,"group_id":"7575450495360175129","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没耐心，怎么不能拉黑，看不惯你滚","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6zUB5AgfDS1b2WWlWqHMj8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a102198fb434401ba1383ef03d1a749b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793173&x-signature=TeriAyTPtO3A2JcgGr43P19lYRo%3D","user_id":"288551012669979","user_name":"Alvitr🍪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"288551012669979","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575450495360175129","book_info":{"abstract":"【中二病犬系女主+正文全员单箭头无cp(刚开分，评分低，正文已完结，番外待不定时补充)】。
对女主来说，Just a game，一切为了全职业图鉴！
有玩家的世界是核平的，但是没有玩家是万万不行的!尊贵的玩家钟离秋，全新综漫全息模拟器诚挚邀您体验拾荒大世界!踏上漫长又坚定的全职业图鉴最强勇者之旅吧！
避雷:原创女主，魔改原作主线剧情，有大篇幅原创剧情，且女主很强，女主才是中心，参考那些男频同人。
目前分卷:（第一篇感觉写的不太好，大家可以跳着看，每个世界风格不同笔触不同）
最强咒术师(咒回):热血搞笑
最强魔法师(HP):领袖+征服魔法界
最强锻刀匠（鬼灭+刀乱+野良神+阴阳师）:日系羁绊
最强偶像魔法使（一人之下+大爱project）:前期日常奇幻+后期科幻
